programme.title: Dance Dance
programme.desc: Two siblings Radha (Smita Patil) and Ramu (Mithun Chakraborty) emerge from poverty and become popular performers, that is, until tragedy strikes them. 'Dance Dance' is the journey of Ramu who vows to take revenge against the man who exploited his mother, murdered his father and tortured his sister.

programme.title: Dance Dance
programme.desc: Two siblings Radha (Smita Patil) and Ramu (Mithun Chakraborty) emerge from poverty and become popular performers, that is, until tragedy strikes them. 'Dance Dance' is the journey of Ramu who vows to take revenge against the man who exploited his mother, murdered his father and tortured his sister.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend’s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Khakee
programme.desc: DCP Anant and his team are assigned to escort an alleged terrorist from Chandangarh to Mumbai. His seemingly simple mission turns into a deadly encounter of survival when a rogue ex-cop turned criminal hinders his way.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: Jai unintentionally kills the husband of a woman that he loves. When she gets diagnosed with amnesia, Jai comforts her and she falls in love with him. Now, guilt-ridden Jai is left in a dilemma whether to confess his guilt or reciprocate her love.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: Jai unintentionally kills the husband of a woman that he loves. When she gets diagnosed with amnesia, Jai comforts her and she falls in love with him. Now, guilt-ridden Jai is left in a dilemma whether to confess his guilt or reciprocate her love.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: Jai unintentionally kills the husband of a woman that he loves. When she gets diagnosed with amnesia, Jai comforts her and she falls in love with him. Now, guilt-ridden Jai is left in a dilemma whether to confess his guilt or reciprocate her love.

programme.title: Dil Ka Rishta
programme.desc: Jai unintentionally kills the husband of a woman that he loves. When she gets diagnosed with amnesia, Jai comforts her and she falls in love with him. Now, guilt-ridden Jai is left in a dilemma whether to confess his guilt or reciprocate her love.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: Shakalaka Boom Boom
programme.desc: A tale of two different musicians dramatically different but united by their passion for music set against the backdrop of the international music industry.

programme.title: Shakalaka Boom Boom
programme.desc: A tale of two different musicians dramatically different but united by their passion for music set against the backdrop of the international music industry.
